title: bauhinia mollis var. mollis
intro: Bauhinia mollis var. mollis, also known as the soft bauhinia or soft orchid tree, is a plant species in the genus Bauhinia, characterized by its soft, velvety leaves and delicate flowers. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which are used to treat various health conditions due to their anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Bauhinia mollis var. mollis include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues, among others. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make ointments, salves, and poultices for topical application.
